get.summary: Get analytics summary for a time range
get.description: Returns status counts, job type breakdown, success rate, and throughput per hour.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 24 hours ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

jobTypeBreakdown.description: Job counts grouped by job type name

successRate.description: Ratio of finished jobs to total completed jobs (0-1)

throughputPerHour.description: Completed jobs per hour in the time range

get.summary: Get timing analytics for a time range
get.description: Returns average, median, and P95 execution times and queue latency per job type.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 24 hours ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

executionTimes.description: Execution time statistics per job type (seconds)

queueLatency.description: Average queue latency per job type (seconds)

get.summary: Get failure analytics for a time range
get.description: Returns top failing job types, top exception classes, retry frequency, and recent failures.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 24 hours ago.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of time range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of recent failures to return (1-200)

topFailingTypes.description: Top 10 failing job types by count

recentFailures.description: Most recent failures in the time range

get.summary: Get background job monitoring status summary

queue.description: Queue the job is running on

get.summary: Get background jobs with filtering, sorting, and pagination

queue.description: Queue the job was dispatched to

retried.description: Whether the job has been retried

has_next_page.description: Whether there is a next page

queue.description: Queue the job was dispatched to

retried.description: Whether the job has been retried

dataTruncated.description: Whether the message payload was truncated

duration.description: Execution time in seconds (null if not finished)

post.description: Deletes finished, failed, and cancelled job monitors older than the specified number of days. Defaults to 7 days.

days.description: Prune jobs older than this many days

post.description: Re-dispatches the original message payload of a failed job. The job must be in Failed status, not previously retried, and have a stored message payload.

newJobId.description: Job ID of the newly dispatched job

post.summary: Cancel a running or queued background job
post.description: Sets a cooperative cancellation flag in Redis. Handlers that implement CancellableJobInterface will detect the flag at their next checkpoint. For queued jobs, the flag is set before the worker picks up the message.

cancelled.description: Whether the cancellation flag was set

get.summary: List all rate limiters with configuration

limiters.description: Map of rate limiter name to configuration

count.description: Total number of configured rate limiters

delete.description: Clears ALL rate limiter state from Redis. Since all limiters share the same cache pool, this resets every limiter. Requires ?confirm=true.

get.summary: Internal server diagnostics with coroutine and channel stats

get.description: Returns queue depths, consumer name, and consumer running status for the messenger transports.

asyncQueueDepth.description: Number of pending messages in the async stream

failedQueueDepth.description: Number of messages in the failed queue

consumerRunning.description: Whether a consumer is actively processing messages (best-effort)

post.description: Removes all messages from the failed transport. Requires ?confirm=true query parameter.

parameters.name: confirm
parameters.description: Must be set to "true" to confirm the operation

flushed.description: Number of messages removed from the failed queue

post.description: Re-dispatches a specific failed message through the messenger worker.

retried.description: The ID of the retried message
